detail: Repository LICENSE changed from Apache-2.0 to AGPL-3.0.
README still describes the core runtime as Apache licensed.
A new external contributor merged a production patch.
Closed customer-reported workflow issue #103.

Added architecture, deployment, and evaluation documentation.
